name: Bisoprolol
executiveSummary: Long-acting cardioselective beta-1 blocker for heart failure (HF) and hypertension (HTN).
indications:
## Indications

- Stable chronic heart failure with systolic dysfunction.
- Hypertension.
- Angina pectoris.

## Precautions

- Gradual titration. Do not discontinue abruptly. Contraindicated in severe asthma and advanced AV block.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: HF: initiate at 1.25 mg/day PO and titrate to 10 mg/day. HTN: 5–10 mg/day.
adulto.administration: PO as a single morning dose.

stability:
## Stability

- Store according to package insert.
adverseEffects:
## Effects

- Bradycardia, hypotension, fatigue, dizziness, bronchospasm.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. Heart failure and hypertension guidelines.
ANMAT. Información de medicamentos y prospectos autorizados en Argentina.
Sociedad Argentina de Cardiología. Guías de práctica clínica.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
